title: Not Enough Horror
description: A small horror mod adding in some horror-like items!
body: ![Not Enough Horror header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7c78b91501f3174d517be3f256c262f4abd3185.png) This mod is part of the "Not Enough" series, being a new mod which adds items and blocks that should be added to any horror modpack. This mod takes suggestions! At the [Form Link!](https://forms.gle/9ngaKTkoXDC3DyTWA) This is a simple standalone mod which aims to add more horror aspect items. The current added items are goes as belows: - Broken Crossbow![Broken Crossbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2bd77d4d1b2c9ca8d3a5ec2299df4818f4a9f73.png) - IV Drip![IV DRip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf00324ff6422309715dec886900e8ae4991996d.png) - Different Blood splatters (not adding a screenshot here for gore reasons) - 3 disks playing horror ambience sounds! From the EItems mod ![3 Disks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3682f531ce019ad99f2aaf0244ceffd567fe650a.png) - Empty and Random Ticket! From the EItems mod ![Empty and Random Ticket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4464c55978ddee6fea74b2ce0c968e43f57e183.png) - Ration Variants![Ration Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/505affb7709463eebd3b67b7d05e08787bdb68e7.png) > - Normal Ration > - Poisoned Ration > - Moldy Ration > - Empty ration > - Saturation Ration > - Extra Ration > - Ration Block - Bandages![Bandages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2041a93a2fb605f87371688f4274e602708f868.png) - Medkits![Medkits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc54015561c60bf10bcb910b08e3e7aacdabaecf.png) - Different corpses for different members (Won't help much if used in another server, and also not adding a screenshot since it contains blood) - Glownach - Glownach Glass - Glownach Glass Panes![All Glownach Variants, left to right: Glownach, Glownach Glass, Glownach Glass Pane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4d81e76a0114c748427286bdfc54cbfd0e45f17.png) - Don't Open Dead Inside![Don't Open Dead Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/195578e8a95cafc6500b1e8f6f3a8ab36403ae78.png)
